overall_recommendation: CONDITIONAL_GO — Revised to EDA-centric design based on pilot evidence

pilot_A_pipeline.key_result: EDA AUROC=0.681 (GO). ASI AUROC=0.476 (NO_GO). RD threshold AUROC=0.410 (NO_GO).
pilot_A_pipeline.action: EDA adopted as primary metric. ASI and RD threshold dropped as primary.

pilot_B1_decoder_geometry.key_result: cos^2(theta) separation is significant but INVERSE to H1: letter features have LOWER decoder cosine with parents (Cohen's d=-0.48 at L6, p=9.7e-6). EDA works at L6 (AUROC=0.681) but fails at L10 (AUROC=0.337).
pilot_B1_decoder_geometry.action: H1 geometric prediction revised: encoder-decoder misalignment (EDA) is the absorption fingerprint, not decoder-decoder cosine.

pilot_B2_scaling_curve.key_result: 11 SAE configs tested. Primary jb suite (5 configs): sigmoid fit beats linear (LRT p=0.027), L0_c~81. AJT SAEs show NEGATIVE EDA delta (inverse to jb). Spearman(1/L0, EDA)=0.191 across all 11 configs (weak/no overall correlation).
pilot_B2_scaling_curve.action: Phase transition directionally supported for primary suite only. AJT architecture anomaly requires investigation in B.3.

pilot_C1_probe_training.key_result: 4 hierarchies pass F1 >= 0.80: first_letter (F1=0.820), noun_proper (F1=0.987), animate_inanimate (F1=1.0). city_country_binary FAILED shuffle gate (excluded).
pilot_C1_probe_training.action: Proceed with 3 hierarchies for C2-REDESIGN: first_letter, noun_proper, animate_inanimate.

pilot_C2_cross_domain_v3.key_result: absorption_rate=0.0 for all clean hierarchies (first_letter, animate_inanimate, noun_proper). Concept latents ARE reliably active (mean_max_activation=16-22). Parent-latent-suppression measurement approach is incorrect.
pilot_C2_cross_domain_v3.action: C.2 redesigned to child-feature-suppression. First_letter sanity check required.

task_B1_eda_decomposition.pass_criteria: Paired t-test p < 0.05: letter feature encoder aligns more with letter probe than decoder does.
task_B1_eda_decomposition.note: Extend from existing B1 pilot data. Should complete very quickly.

task_B1_pairwise_eda.pass_criteria: EDA AUROC >= 0.60 on exact Chanin labels. If < 0.60, investigate label source before full run.
task_B1_pairwise_eda.note: Critical: first time using exact Chanin labels. Validate label loading before full run.

task_C2_redesign.pass_criteria: Ratio-to-null >= 1.5 for first_letter hierarchy (sanity check). absorption_rate > 0.0 for at least 1 hierarchy.
task_C2_redesign.note: First test of redesigned child-suppression measurement. Must verify the pipeline produces non-zero signal for first_letter before committing to full run.

task_D1_eda_validation.pass_criteria: EDA AUROC >= 0.60 on exact labels. AUPRC computed successfully.
task_D1_eda_validation.note: Depends on exact Chanin labels loaded successfully in B1_pairwise_eda.

task_E1_phase_transition.pass_criteria: True sae-spelling absorption rate measured for at least 3 configs. Non-trivial rate > 5% for at least 2 configs.
task_E1_phase_transition.note: Key risk: true absorption_rate with sae-spelling metric may be near zero. Check against sae-spelling reference values.

task_E2_hysteresis.pass_criteria: SAE fine-tuning API accessible and completes 100 steps without OOM.
task_E2_hysteresis.note: GPU: RTX PRO 6000 confirmed (from B2 pilot). GPT-2 Small + SAE should fit comfortably.

critical_risks_identified.risk: Exact Chanin labels may not be directly loadable from sae-spelling repo in expected format
critical_risks_identified.mitigation: Fall back to probe-alignment proxy labels (n_pos=71). Acknowledge in methods. Pilot B1_pairwise_eda tests this first.

critical_risks_identified.risk: C2-REDESIGN child-suppression measurement may still find absorption_rate~0 even for first_letter
critical_risks_identified.mitigation: If first_letter sanity check fails (ratio < 1.5), investigate pipeline bug. May need to use sae-spelling repo directly for first_letter measurement.

critical_risks_identified.risk: Phase transition detection (E.1) needs true sae-spelling absorption rates, not EDA proxy
critical_risks_identified.mitigation: Measure true sae-spelling absorption rate for all configs in E.1. If all < 5%, report phase transition as 'not detected at GPT-2 Small scale.'

critical_risks_identified.risk: EDA may not achieve AUROC >= 0.65 on exact Chanin labels (only 0.681 on proxy labels)
critical_risks_identified.mitigation: Proxy-label result provides lower bound estimate. If exact labels give AUROC < 0.55, investigate label definition mismatch before reporting.

critical_risks_identified.risk: H1 theory requires revision — original prediction falsified (direction of cos^2 effect was wrong)
critical_risks_identified.mitigation: F.1 revised theory must be completed BEFORE paper writing. Demote to Proposition if algebraic derivation cannot be completed rigorously.

go_criteria_for_full_execution.EDA_auroc_confirmed: EDA AUROC >= 0.60 on exact Chanin labels (task_D1). Required for H3-revised.
go_criteria_for_full_execution.C2_sanity_check_passed: C2-REDESIGN first_letter ratio-to-null >= 1.5. Required for H2.
go_criteria_for_full_execution.theory_complete: F.1 theory document with complete derivation or explicit Proposition label. Required for theoretical contribution.
go_criteria_for_full_execution.figure1_generated: Figure 1 exists as a PDF (not text descriptor). Required for submission.

sample_size_rationale.n_pos_requirement: Minimum 50 for reliable AUROC signal. Pilot confirmed n_pos=71 for proxy labels. Exact Chanin labels at L6 expected n_pos >= 67.
sample_size_rationale.openwebtext_size: 10,000 tokens for full frequency estimation. 100 tokens per letter class minimum for absorption measurement (26 classes x 100 = 2,600 tokens minimum).
sample_size_rationale.cross_domain_requirement: 50 concept tokens per parent category minimum for C2-REDESIGN. With 100 permutations for null control.
